content: Cross-vendor KDS item lifecycle (Toast/NCR Aloha/Oracle Simphony docs): Sent (order reaches KDS, blue/initial) -> Fired (released to prep display) -> Started/In-Progress (cook acknowledges, begins prep) -> Bumped (cook marks done, single tap 'Bump'/'Bump All') -> Ready (expo flashes ready). 'Served' is never tracked by the KDS itself in any vendor doc found -- it is exclusively a front-of-house/server action once food leaves the pass.
